digitalMarketing.question: What digital marketing services do you offer?
digitalMarketing.answer: We cover SEO, paid ads (Google & social), email marketing, content strategy, and analytics. We tailor a mix to your goals and budget.

digitalMarketing.question: How soon will I see results?
digitalMarketing.answer: Paid campaigns can drive traffic within days. SEO and content typically show meaningful gains in 3–6 months as authority builds.

digitalMarketing.question: Do you manage ad spend?
digitalMarketing.answer: Yes. We set up, monitor, and optimize campaigns on Google, Meta, and LinkedIn, reporting on ROAS and conversions monthly.

digitalMarketing.question: Will I get reports?
digitalMarketing.answer: Absolutely. You'll receive a clear monthly report with traffic, conversions, spend, and the next month's plan.

analytics.question: What analytics platforms do you work with?
analytics.answer: GA4, Google Tag Manager, Looker Studio, Meta Pixel, and server-side tracking. We can integrate with your CRM too.

analytics.question: Can you fix our broken tracking?
analytics.answer: Yes. We audit your setup, fix event tracking, and document everything so your data is reliable going forward.

analytics.question: Do you build dashboards?
analytics.answer: Yes. We design custom dashboards in Looker Studio so stakeholders see the metrics that matter at a glance.

analytics.question: Is this GDPR / privacy compliant?
analytics.answer: We implement consent-aware tracking and respect user privacy regulations relevant to your audience.

brandDevelopment.question: What does brand development include?
brandDevelopment.answer: Discovery, positioning, naming (if needed), logo and visual identity, typography, color, voice, and brand guidelines.

brandDevelopment.question: How long does branding take?
brandDevelopment.answer: A full identity project typically runs 4–8 weeks. Lighter brand refreshes can be completed in 2–3 weeks.

brandDevelopment.question: Will I own the final assets?
brandDevelopment.answer: Yes. You receive full ownership and source files (AI, SVG, PNG) along with a brand guidelines document.

brandDevelopment.question: Can you refresh an existing brand?
brandDevelopment.answer: Definitely. We can evolve your current identity to feel modern without losing recognition.

automation.question: What can you automate?
automation.answer: Lead capture and routing, follow-up emails, CRM updates, invoicing, reporting, and repetitive internal tasks.

automation.question: Which tools do you use?
automation.answer: Zapier, Make, n8n, native APIs, and custom scripts depending on what fits best with your stack.

automation.question: Will it work with my CRM?
automation.answer: Most likely yes. We integrate with HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, GoHighLevel, Airtable, and many others.

automation.question: How do you handle errors?
automation.answer: We build in monitoring and alerting so failed runs are caught and retried, not lost silently.

consultations.question: What happens on a consultation call?
consultations.answer: We learn your goals, audit what you have, and leave you with clear next steps you can act on—whether or not you hire us.

consultations.question: How long is a consultation?
consultations.answer: Typically 30–60 minutes via video call. We can extend to a deeper workshop if needed.

consultations.question: Is the first call free?
consultations.answer: Yes. The discovery call is free with no obligation.

consultations.question: Do you sign NDAs?
consultations.answer: Yes. We're happy to sign your NDA before sharing sensitive details.
